title: Status & Informasi
description: Melihat status repository, riwayat commit, dan perbedaan file.

commands.name: git status
commands.title: Melihat Status Repository
commands.description: Menampilkan status working directory dan staging area.
commands.examples:
git status
git status -s
git status -sb
commands.notes: M = modified, A = added, D = deleted, ? = untracked, U = conflict.

commands.name: git log
commands.title: Melihat Riwayat Commit
commands.description: Menampilkan history commit dari terbaru ke terlama.
commands.examples:
git log
git log --oneline
git log --oneline --graph --all
git log --author="John" --since="2024-01-01"
git log --grep="fix" --oneline
git log -5 --stat
git log --pretty=format:"%h %an %ar %s"
commands.notes: git log --oneline --graph --all adalah salah satu perintah paling berguna.

commands.name: git show
commands.title: Detail Commit Tertentu
commands.description: Menampilkan informasi detail dan diff dari sebuah commit.
commands.examples:
git show HEAD
git show abc1234
git show HEAD~2
git show v1.0
git show HEAD:src/main.ts  # lihat file di commit tertentu
commands.notes: HEAD~n artinya n commit sebelum HEAD.

commands.name: git diff
commands.title: Melihat Perubahan
commands.description: Menampilkan perbedaan antara berbagai state (working, staged, commit).
commands.examples:
git diff
git diff --staged
git diff HEAD
git diff main..feature
git diff --stat HEAD~3
git diff -- src/App.tsx
commands.notes: git diff tanpa argumen hanya menunjukkan perubahan yang BELUM di-stage.

commands.name: git shortlog
commands.title: Ringkasan Commit per Author
commands.description: Menampilkan commit yang dikelompokkan berdasarkan author.
commands.examples:
git shortlog
git shortlog -sn
git shortlog -sne
